nasb.text: and the one who picks up their carcasses shall wash his clothes and be unclean until evening; they are unclean to you.

esv.text: and he who carries their carcass shall wash his clothes and be unclean until the evening; they are unclean to you.

cnv.text: 拾起牠們屍體的，就要洗淨自己的衣服，並且不潔淨到晚上。以上這些你們應以為不潔淨。

ccb.text: 凡拿它们尸体的人都必须洗净所穿的衣服，要等到傍晚才能洁净。你们要视它们为不洁净的动物。
